login.headline: All for His glory.
login.supporting: Helps you lead worship — then steps aside when the Spirit takes over. Focus on the room, not the screen.
login.cardDescription: Enter your email to receive a one-time code, or use Google.

oauth.hint: You'll be redirected to complete sign-in and returned here.

home.stubBody: You are signed in. Library lists are coming in the next milestone.
home.e2: Browse experiences ship in a later milestone (E2).

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This path is not part of the app yet.

install.iosStep1: Tap the Share button in Safari.
install.iosStep2: Scroll and choose Add to Home Screen.
install.iosStep3: Open Worship from your home screen for a fullscreen experience.
install.safariMacBody: In Safari, open the File menu and choose “Add to Dock” when it’s available (macOS 14 or later), or use File → Share → Add to Dock. Then open Worship from the Dock for an app-like window.
install.genericBody: Use your browser’s menu to install this site or add it to your home screen or apps. In Chrome or Edge, look for the install icon in the address bar; in other browsers, check the main or app menu.

error.body: Something went wrong while loading this list.

actions.deleteOfflineHint: Unavailable offline — connect to delete items.
actions.exportPdfHint: Opens the print dialog — choose Save as PDF.

createChooser.title: Add to library
createChooser.description: Create a blank song or import ChordPro / Worship Pro files.

addToSetlist.title: Add to setlist
addToSetlist.alreadyInSetlist: This song is already in that setlist.
addToSetlist.failed: Could not add the song to the setlist.

delete.title: Delete this item?
delete.body: “{{name}}” will be removed from your library.
delete.collectionNotEmptyBody: “{{name}}” still contains songs. Delete every song in the collection first, then try again.
delete.collectionNotEmpty: Remove all songs from the collection before deleting it.

hub.createOfflineHint: Connect to the internet to add items.

offlinePlayer.onlineOnlyType: This player is available only when you’re online.
offlinePlayer.setlistNotCached: This setlist isn’t available offline. Open it in the player once while online, then try again.

player.empty: Nothing to show in this player.
player.threeColumnEmpty: This song has no sections to show.
player.evicted: This setlist is no longer cached. Reconnect to continue.
player.setlistDeleted: This setlist was removed by the team — playing local cache for the last time.

toc.title: Contents
toc.emptyLiked: No liked songs in this list.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Choose how Worship Viewer behaves on this device.

language.title: Language
language.description: Pick a language or follow your browser preference.
language.browserDescription: Automatically choose English or German from your browser languages.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Control the color theme for this device.
appearance.systemDescription: Follow your browser or operating system light/dark setting.

collectionsViewMode.title: Collections layout
collectionsViewMode.description: Choose how collections appear in the library. Songs and setlists always use list view.
collectionsViewMode.listDescription: Show collections as rows with cover thumbnails.
collectionsViewMode.cardDescription: Show collections as cover cards (A4 aspect ratio).
collectionsViewMode.adaptiveDescription: Show cards in landscape and list in portrait.

chordFormat.title: Chord format
chordFormat.description: Choose how chords are shown in the song editor and player.
chordFormat.lettersDescription: Show standard chord symbols such as C, G, and Am.
chordFormat.nashvilleDescription: Show Nashville numbers such as 1, 4, and 6m.

sheetBackground.title: Sheet background
sheetBackground.description: Choose the background behind chord sheets and attachments in the player and song preview.
sheetBackground.whiteDescription: Always use a white page, including in dark mode (best for printing and scans).
sheetBackground.appDescription: Match the app surface color so sheets blend with the rest of the interface.

playerScroll.portraitDescription: Choose how the player advances when the sheet is upright.
playerScroll.landscapeDescription: Choose how the player advances when the sheet is sideways.
playerScroll.bookDescription: As if they were inside a book.
playerScroll.twoColumnDescription: Full-screen scroll with two columns of song sections.
playerScroll.twoColumnNextDescription: Two columns with the next song continuing in the column flow in gray, clipped to what fits on screen.
playerScroll.threeColumnDescription: Full-screen scroll with three columns of song sections.
playerScroll.threeColumnNextDescription: Three columns with the next song continuing in the column flow in gray, clipped to what fits on screen.

defaultMode.title: Default player mode
defaultMode.description: Primary tap on songs, setlists, and collections opens the player in this mode.
defaultMode.avDescription: Lyric projection with separate content and background layers.

content.title: Content layer
content.description: Typography and layout for projected lyrics.

background.title: Background layer
background.colorDescription: Fill the slide with a single color.
background.videoDescription: Use a looping background video URL.

transition.title: Slide transition
transition.durationDescription: Milliseconds for slide transitions (respects reduced motion).

projection.autoOpenDescription: Open a second window for beamer output when AV mode starts.
projection.autoOpenOnDescription: Try to open the output window on AV launch.
projection.autoOpenOffDescription: Open the output window from AV controls.
projection.fullscreenDescription: Double-click the output window to enter fullscreen.
projection.fullscreenOnDescription: Double-click toggles fullscreen on the output window.
projection.fullscreenOffDescription: Disable double-click fullscreen on the output window.

profilePicture.title: Profile picture
profilePicture.description: Upload a JPEG or PNG image. It is shown in the menu header and replaces your linked account photo while an upload is set.
profilePicture.unsupportedType: Only JPEG or PNG images are supported.
profilePicture.invalid: That file isn’t a valid image.
profilePicture.tooLarge: This image is too large. Try a smaller file.
profilePicture.failed: Could not update your profile picture.
profilePicture.removeFailed: Could not remove your uploaded photo.

cache.title: Cache
cache.description: Clear local app data and reload your session. Language and appearance choices stay in place.
cache.approxSize: Approximate stored data: {{size}} (offline player cache + list cache).

account.title: Account
account.description: Jump to account-related areas or sign out on this device.

create.dialogDescription: Give your setlist a title. You’ll add songs in the editor.

editor.readOnlyBanner: Read-only — you don’t have edit access on this team.
editor.removeBrokenToSave: Remove unavailable songs before changes can sync.
editor.brokenAutosavePaused: Saving paused until unavailable songs are fixed.
editor.resumePrompt: You’re back online. Resume syncing your edits?
editor.emptyHint: No songs yet — use Add songs below.
editor.pickerExcluded: This item can’t be added to setlists.

create.dialogDescription: Give your collection a title. You’ll add songs in the editor.

editor.readOnlyBanner: Read-only — you don’t have edit access on this team.
editor.removeBrokenToSave: Remove unavailable songs to keep saving.
editor.brokenAutosavePaused: Saving paused until unavailable songs are fixed.
editor.resumePrompt: You’re back online. Resume syncing your edits?
editor.emptyHint: No songs yet — use Add songs below.
editor.pickerExcluded: This item can’t be added to collections.

moveToCollection.title: Move song to collection
moveToCollection.empty: No other collections to move this song into.
moveToCollection.failedPartial: The song may be in both collections briefly — reload and try removing it from here if needed.
moveToCollection.alreadyThere: That song is already in the selected collection.
moveToCollection.flushFailed: Finish saving or fix unavailable songs before moving.
moveToCollection.notFound: This song isn’t on the server anymore; reload if the list looks wrong.

create.dialogDescription: A blank song will open in the editor so you can add ChordPro content.

editor.readOnlyBanner: Read-only — you don’t have edit access on this team.
editor.notASongChip: This item is marked as not a song (read-only).
editor.parseBlocked: Saving paused until ChordPro parses cleanly.
editor.previewBlocked: Preview unavailable while the source has parse errors.
editor.wasmFailed: Could not load the chord engine.
editor.ugUrlHint: Save the Ultimate Guitar page in your browser (Save Page As or View Source), then paste the HTML here to import.
editor.ugImportFailed: Could not import Ultimate Guitar HTML:
editor.resumePrompt: You’re back online. Resume syncing your edits?
editor.importReplaceDescription: Importing will replace your unsaved edits in the source editor.
editor.exportPdfHint: Opens the print dialog — choose Save as PDF.

import.dialogDescription: Choose one or more ChordPro or Worship Pro files. Each valid file becomes a new song.
import.pickFilesAria: Choose ChordPro or Worship Pro files

teams.personalNameLocked: Personal team name cannot be changed.
teams.membersEditHint: Change roles, then save. The team must keep at least one admin.
teams.membersEditHintPersonal: Change roles, then save. The team owner always has admin access; listed members do not need to include an admin.
teams.needOneAdmin: The team must have at least one admin.
teams.deleteTeamDescription: This removes the team for everyone. Library content may be affected depending on the server. This cannot be undone.
teams.deleteFailed: Could not delete the team. Personal teams cannot be deleted here.
teams.inviteAdminOnly: Only team admins can manage invitations.
teams.inviteDialogDescription: Create a link and share it. Anyone signed in can open it to join this team.
teams.createDescription: Add a shared team for your worship group.

joinTeam.invalidLink: This invitation link is missing required information.

sessions.listDescription: Devices and browsers where you are signed in. Revoke a session to sign out there.
sessions.currentUnknownHint: The current browser can’t be highlighted: the session cookie is not visible to this page (often HttpOnly for security). Your sign-in is still valid.
sessions.revokeBody: That device will be signed out of Worship Viewer.
